title: I am a Comedian
original_title: アイアムアコメディアン
overview: Daisuke is a comedian who was excluded from TV because of his political statements. This is the story of three years filled with his challenges, suffering, and love for his family.

trailers.title: アイ アム ア コメディアン - 予告編｜I AM A COMEDIAN - Trailer｜第35回東京国際映画祭 35th Tokyo International Film Festival
